name: Application for Surplus Levy Proceeds

eligibility.description: Available to any person legally entitled to proceeds remaining after the IRS applies sale proceeds to expenses and the delinquent tax liability.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can claim a refund or credit for any money remaining from a seizure and sale of property after the expenses and the specific tax liability have been satisfied.
